expectations.text: Shows nf-test.config with at least testsDir, workDir, configFile, and profile settings (all active, not commented out)
expectations.evidence: testsDir "tests" / workDir ".nf-test" / configFile "tests/nextflow.config" / profile "docker" — all uncommented

expectations.text: Describes tests/ directory structure with example layout
Shows tests/nextflow.config with process resource overrides (cpus, memory)
expectations.evidence: process { cpus = 1 / memory = "2.GB" / withName: "STAR_ALIGN" { cpus = 2 / memory = "4.GB" } }

expectations.text: All four requested topics (init, config, structure, resource limits) are addressed
expectations.evidence: Sections 1–4 cover: Initializing nf-test, What Goes in nf-test.config, How to Structure the tests/ Directory, Configuring tests/nextflow.config to Limit CPU/Memory
